com.saxonica.ee.stream

Class StreamingApplyTemplates

  • java.lang.Object
    • net.sf.saxon.expr.Expression
      • net.sf.saxon.expr.instruct.Instruction
        • net.sf.saxon.expr.instruct.ApplyTemplates
          • com.saxonica.ee.stream.StreamingApplyTemplates
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    javax.xml.transform.SourceLocator, ITemplateCall, TailCallReturner, IdentityComparable, InstructionInfo

    public class StreamingApplyTemplates
extends ApplyTemplates
    Streaming version of the xsl:apply-templates instruction. Available in Saxon-EE only. Only used for select="doc(..)" or select="document(...)" or select="doc(..)//x" etc. It is not used for other apply-templates instructions occurring in a streaming template.

    • Nested Class Summary
